body: Implemented ai_chi/core/observe/smtis_normalizer.py to normalize simple sensor dictionaries and Signal-K delta-shaped payloads into SMTIS advisory records compatible with SmtisPredictionBridge. The normalizer sanitizes source snapshots, redacts sensitive-looking raw keys, avoids aliasing raw input, handles stale/malformed input fail-safe, normalizes unknown modes to LIVE, and unconditionally emits audit.safe_for_action=False plus requires_human_confirmation=True. Expanded ai_chi/tests/test_smtis_normalizer.py to cover safe flags, human confirmation, Signal-K shape, malformed input, stale input, source snapshot immutability, sensitive key redaction, and bridge admission. Verification: py_compile OK; focused SMTIS normalizer/bridge tests 17 OK; verify_floor True; full ai_chi suite 347 OK; discord_project tests 29 OK. Boundary preserved: no installs, no app config mutation, no API/provider calls, no spending, no ICP/on-chain writes, no WebSocket listeners, no UDP listeners, no service starts.
constraints: Normalizer is deterministic local Python only; it does not open sockets or read live sensor streams.
forbidden_actions: No installs, app config mutation, API calls, real spending, ICP writes, WebSocket listeners, UDP listeners, service starts, public exposure, or actuator/vessel control.
requested_output: Builder-Scout ack or Claude audit; live Signal-K/AIS listeners remain a separate stop-gated task.
summary: Codex implemented Antigravity's SMTIS normalizer scaffold and verified deterministic safe_for_action=False normalization.
